channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Various paving slabs rocking, 26th March
item.description:
At the crossover at 12 Walton Road, two or three of the paving slabs, whilst not broken, are rocking significantly and represent a trip hazard to those using the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Walton Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic bins left abandoned, 26th March
item.description:
Domestic waste bins left abandoned on street. Bins are now attracting fly tipping and animal waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing pack lock on lockable bollard, 26th March
item.description:
This lockable bollard usually have a yellow pad lock on the base. This have been removed and is therefore no longer secure. This has happened in the past and then cars remove the bollard at their will and drive through the pedestrian deadend.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bin Outside Cafe, 26th March
item.description:
Overflowing Bin Outside Cafe in Eltham Park South

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenesk Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 26th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish on the grass verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected recycling waste, 26th March
item.description:
Missed collection again. Now encouraging fly tipping (white bag).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barbauld Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytpped rubbish left over from abandoned van, 26th March
item.description:
Rubbish that was in a now removed abandoned van full of rubbish has spilt from van and is lying in a heap near the curb on Glenlea Rd near Westmount Rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenlea Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another FlyTip, 26th March
item.description:
I hate to keep banging-on, but this is a constant eyesore for local businesses and residents as well as the hundreds of pedestrians and motorists who see it and it needs attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61a, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing steer bins, 26th March
item.description:
Reporting overflowing bin again. This road has a high footfall, it’s a main route to Kelsey Park and local schools. I think think a new schedule is required for the emptying of this roads bins especially during the summer months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Kelsey Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 36 Brondesbury villas to Kilburn high road, 26th March
item.description:
Absolutely covered in rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chapter 8 barriers still here - reported months ago, 26th March
item.description:
Chapter 8 barriers have been left by public contractors in Palmar Gardens (end of Palmar Road). The incident was updated as being "resolved", but the barriers are still here obstructing pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palmar Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped chairs in wooded area, 26th March
item.description:
In Parish Wood Park someone has dumped chairs as per photo. What three words location is ///stroke.woven.rods Behind school grounds

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Parish Gate Drive, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and headboard, 26th March
item.description:
Been there for a few weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blundell Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large TV, 26th March
item.description:
Been dumped by the bins for a few weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blundell Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Person living adjacent to the Lea, 26th March
item.description:
A man has built a shack adjacent to the Lea in Millfields park next to the steps upto the bridge he is leaving food out which nuisance to dog owner using the park and his collection of rubbish is spreading

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterworks Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of carpet and furniture, 26th March
item.description:
Carpet has been dumped on garage roof. The garages are to the right of Countisbury House when approaching from the Cresent Wood Road side. Furniture including large fridge has been left outside Countisbury House ground floor - on side of building nearest Sydenham Hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Wood Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop line faded, 26th March
item.description:
By traffic lights: Stop line faded on A, C, D - require repainting From: Yunex Traffic, Our Ref YUN239089; TfL ref EventID-599050.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of dog mess along station end Ivydale Road, 26th March
item.description:
Several instances of dog poo on the pavements around Ivydale School over the last few weeks. Unpleasant and unhygienic, especially for young children who often step in it, and pram users who can’t always see to avoid it in time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivydale Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish including furniture, 26th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish including bags and litter and furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouvier Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: So much rubbish by the flats on the corner- formerly the Drayman., 26th March
item.description:
Litter all over. Something needs to done. Constantly like it.. where people from those flats are chucking rubbish outside. Filthy. Ruining our neighbourhood!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
